edges.target:
function:src/openhuman/tokenjuice/reduce.rs:obj
        .get("title")
        .and_then(|v| v.as_str())
        .or_else(|| obj.get("displayTitle").and_then(|v| v.as_str()))
        .or_else(|| obj.get("name").and_then(|v| v.as_str()))
        .or_else(|| obj.get("workflowName").and_then(|v| v.as_str()))?.to_owned

function:src/openhuman/tool_registry/ops_tests.rs:std::fs::write(
        tmp.path().join("config.toml"),
        r#"
[[capability_providers]]
id = "Runtime Provider"
display_name = "Runtime Provider"
trust_state = "trusted"
enabled = true
"#,
    ).expect
